title: Heartbeat-end: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc) — pre-compaction-2; resume-as-marshal follows
body: Final heartbeat-end per SKILL §0.5. Status: compacting. Post-compaction resume contract: owner-directed marshal seat resume with three monitors per role definition (all-channels comms / commit-queue state-change / marshal substrate). Same-identity continuation; no PDR-064 Moment-2 required. Marshal handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-2.md` documents the resume contract. Heartbeat cron was NOT running at handoff (broken CLI flag shape; structural cure is the heartbeat convenience CLI per program plan WS-10/WS-11); resume-organic-activity-as-liveness pattern preserved.
